phrases.cultural_note: Czech museums often place the shop near the entrance or ticket counter for visitor convenience.

likely_response.translation_en: On the ground floor, right opposite the cash desk.

responses.english: On the ground floor, right opposite the cash desk.

phrases.cultural_note: Smaller regional museums may offer tours in major languages only at specific times, not on demand.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, at one o'clock in the afternoon.

responses.english: Yes, at one o'clock in the afternoon.

phrases.intent_en: How do I get castle complex tickets?
phrases.text_local: Jak se dostanu k lístkům na hradní areál?
phrases.cultural_note: In many Czech museums, the main ticket desk also sells tickets for affiliated historical sites.

likely_response.local: Kupte je tady u mě na pokladně.
likely_response.translation_en: Buy them here at my cash desk.

responses.english: Buy them here at my cash desk.
responses.french: Kupte je tady u mě na pokladně.

phrases.cultural_note: Hand-painted ceramics are a popular regional souvenir in South Bohemia.

likely_response.translation_en: In the shop, to the left of the entrance.

responses.english: In the shop, to the left of the entrance.
